name: Chengdu Leejun Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Leejun Industrial Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, sells, and services material grinding and separation systems in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers roller presses and separators for use in the cement raw material, clinker grinding, metallurgical mining, and other fields. It also provides technical services; and spare parts for a range of products and auxiliary equipment. Chengdu Leejun Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.
